chapters.title: Neuron Models
chapters.transcript: Hodgkin-Huxley model, integrate-and-fire. Ion channels, action potentials.

chapters.title: Synaptic Plasticity
chapters.transcript: Long-term potentiation, Hebbian learning. Spike-timing-dependent plasticity.

chapters.title: Population Dynamics
chapters.transcript: Rate coding, population vectors. Wilson-Cowan equations. Neural field models.

chapters.title: Learning and Memory
chapters.transcript: Hopfield networks, attractor dynamics. Reinforcement learning in dopamine system.

chapters.title: Brain-Computer Interfaces
chapters.transcript: EEG decoding, motor imagery. Neural prosthetics. Spike sorting.
